name: Single filer at median income in Zürich (2026)
description: Standard case for single person earning CHF 80,000 in Zürich canton

sources.description: Calculated using official 2026 federal tax brackets. Cantonal/Municipal now using progressive brackets: 8% up to 50k, 12% from 50k-150k. Federal tax ~976 CHF on taxable income of ~69,880. Cantonal ~7,600 CHF using bracket calculation. Social contributions 6.4%.
